title: Spike: in-plugin egui overlay via present callback

description: Add self-hosted overlay deps to honse-debug (own egui + egui
notes: egui-directx11 =0.12.1 (ships precompiled shader blobs, egui ^0.33 + windows ^0.62.2 match workspace); windows crate w/ D3D11+DXGI features; egui default_fonts for own context

description: Bootstrap renderer from present callback: obtain device/cont
notes: own_overlay.rs: lazy init from present callback (GetDevice/GetImmediateContext/Renderer::new), own egui Context, demo window w/ button+checkbox+text field. Compiles+clippy clean; in-game gate = t-005

description: Handle backbuffer resize: detect size change per frame, recr
notes: RTV cached keyed by backbuffer size, recreated on change; minimized (0x0) skips frame. In-game fullscreen-toggle gate = t-005

description: Input: subclass game WndProc after edge (call-through), tran
notes: WndProc subclass (SetWindowLongPtrW, call-through via CallWindowProcW); mouse move/buttons/wheel + WM_CHAR + minimal key map; swallows only when egui wants_pointer/keyboard; moves always pass through; best-effort chain-safe restore on detach. In-game gate = t-005

description: Coexistence validation: edge menu open/close, notifications,
notes: In-game validation PASSED (user): own-egui window renders + full interaction (button/checkbox/text), game input passthrough correct, Alt+9 toggle (via direct WndProc), fullscreen/resolution fixed by per-frame RTV, edge menu coexists (screenshot). Found+fixed: duplicate 'Show Honse Tracker' menu items (shared surface title across DLLs -> per-plugin titles)

description: Write findings + go/no-go recommendation into plan notes; en
notes: GO. FINDINGS.md written in plan dir: all acceptance criteria pass on real hw; 6 encoded gotchas (per-frame RTV, WndProc-first chords, transient-error tolerance, per-plugin titles, z-order, state backup) + 6 productization requirements

description: Investigate edge menu (Right Arrow) not opening on user mach
notes: Log proof: keydown vk=0x27 arrives and is forwarded (wants_kb=false); edge menu opens (screenshot). Earlier report was pre-diagnostics; no plugin-side bug

description: Per-plugin surface titles shipped as part of t-005 fixups (I
notes: implemented in same commit; build+tests+clippy green
